description: The command can search and remove the up to 1000 rows in single execution. To remove the next set of data table rows, execute the command with the page token as

outputs.description: Identifier for the detection. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.ruleId Identifier for the rule generating the detection.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.id

outputs.description: Identifier for the rule version generating the detection. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.ruleName Name of the rule generating the detection, as parsed from ruleText.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.ruleVersion

outputs.description: Date The start time of the window the detection was found in. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.timeWindowEndTime
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.timeWindowStartTime

outputs.description: The end time of the window the detection was found in. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.alertState Indicates whether the rule generating this detection currently has alerting enabled or disabled.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: URL pointing to the Chronicle UI for this detection. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.type Type of detection.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.urlBackToProduct

outputs.description: Date Time the detection was created. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.detectionTime
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.createdTime

outputs.description: The time period the detection was found in. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.ruleType Whether the rule generating this detection is a single event or multi-event rule.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The key for a field specified in the rule, for MULTI_EVENT rules. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.detectionFields.value The value for a field specified in the rule, for MULTI_EVENT rules.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.detectionFields.key

outputs.description: The variable a given set of UDM events belongs to. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principalAssetIdentifier Specifies the principal asset identifier of the event.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.label

outputs.description: Specifies the target asset identifier of the event. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.eventType Specifies the type of the event.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.targetAssetIdentifier

outputs.description: Date The GMT timestamp when the event was generated. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.ingestedTimestamp
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.eventTimestamp

outputs.description: The GMT timestamp when the event was ingested in the vendor's instance. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.description Human-readable description of the event.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Short, descriptive, human-readable, and product-specific event name or type. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.productLogId A vendor-specific event identifier to uniquely identify the event (a GUID). Users might use this identifier to search the vendor's proprietary console for the event in question.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.productEventType

outputs.description: Specifies the name of the product. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.productVersion Specifies the version of the product.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.productName

outputs.description: URL linking to a relevant website where you can view more information about this specific event or the general event category. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.vendorName Specifies the product vendor's name.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.urlBackToProduct

outputs.description: Vendor-specific unique device identifier. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.email Email address.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.assetId

outputs.description: Client hostname or domain name field. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.platform Platform operating system.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.hostname

outputs.description: Platform operating system patch level. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.platformVersion Platform operating system version.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.platformPatchLevel

outputs.description: IP address associated with a network connection. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.port Source or destination network port number when a specific network connection is described within an event.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.ip

outputs.description: MAC addresses associated with a device. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.administrativeDomain Domain which the device belongs to (for example, the Windows domain).
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.mac

outputs.description: Standard URL. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.fileMetadata Metadata associated with the file.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.url

outputs.description: Full path identifying the location of the file on the system. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.md5 MD5 hash value of the file.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.fullPath

outputs.description: Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) type of the file. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.sha1 SHA-1 hash value of the file.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.mimeType

outputs.description: SHA-256 hash value of the file. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.size Size of the file.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.file.sha256

outputs.description: Stores the command line string for the process. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.productSpecificProcessId Stores the product specific process ID.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.commandLine

outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.productSpecificParentProcessId

outputs.description: Metadata associated with the file. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.fullPath Full path identifying the location of the file on the system.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.fileMetadata

outputs.description: MD5 hash value of the file. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.mimeType Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) type of the file.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.md5

outputs.description: SHA-1 hash value of the file. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.sha256 SHA-256 hash value of the file.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.sha1

outputs.description: Size of the file. GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.parentPid Stores the process ID for the parent process.
outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.file.size

outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.process.pid

outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.registry.registryValueName

outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.user.emailAddresses

outputs.name: GoogleChronicleBackstory.Detections.collectionElements.references.principal.user.firstName
